summary_text: ### 修正対象 [`scripts/fugue-execute.mjs`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs index 94f95829..9256f633 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -1,30 +1,58 @@ #!/usr/bin/env node -import { appendFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, readdirSync, renameSync, rmSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; import { createHash, randomUUID } from "node:crypto"; import { createRequire } from "node:module"; -import os from "node:os"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; import idempotencyModule from "./lib/idempotency.js"; -import outputFilterModule from "./lib/output-filter.js"; - -const HOME = os.homedir(); const SCRIPT_DIR = path.dirname(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname); -const STATE_DIR = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "state"); -const RUN_DIR = path.join(STATE_DIR, "runs"); -const CACHE_DIR = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "cache", "lane-outputs"); -const RUN_LOG = path.join(STATE_DIR, "lane-runs.jsonl"); -const PROVIDER_STATE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "fugue-provider-state.json"); -const PHASE_EVIDENCE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); -const TASK_COMPLETION_JOURNAL = path.join(STATE_DIR, "task-completion-journal.jsonl"); const BRIDGE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "fugue-lane-bridge.mjs"); const VOTE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "consensus-vote.js"); const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const autoReview = require("./lib/auto-review.js"); +const completionLib = require("./lib/completion.js"); +const runStateLib = require("./lib/run-state.js"); +const { classifySovereignty } = require("./lib/sovereignty.js"); +const { + RUN_DIR, + RUN_LOG, + PHASE_EVIDENCE, + PROVIDER_STATE, + appendJsonl, + artifactsPath, + buildMatrixFile, + cleanRuns, + ensureDir, + printRunList, + readJson, + readRunState, + updateProviderState, + writeLaneOutput, +} = runStateLib; +const { finalSummary } = completionLib; +const completionDeps = () => ({ + PHASE_EVIDENCE, + RUN_DIR, + appendJsonl, + artifactsPath, + ensureDir, + implementationMatrix, + planningMatrix, + simulationMatrix, + writeJson: runStateLib.writeJson, +}); +const runStateDeps = () => ({ + finalSummary, + writeCompletionEnvelope: (runState) => completionLib.writeCompletionEnvelope(runState, completionDeps()), + writeProjectOsTicket: (runState) => completionLib.writeProjectOsTicket(runState, completionDeps()), + writeTaskCompletionArtifacts: (runState) => completionLib.writeTaskCompletionArtifacts(runState, completionDeps()), +}); +const recordPhase = (state, phase, detail) => runStateLib.recordPhase(state, phase, detail, summarize); +const saveState = (state, patch = {}) => runStateLib.saveState(state, patch, runStateDeps()); +const writeProjectOsTicket = (runState) => completionLib.writeProjectOsTicket(runState, completionDeps()); @@ -function ensureDir(...) { ... } -function readJson(...) { ... } -function writeJson(...) { ... } -function appendJsonl(...) { ... } -function sanitizeForPersistence(...) { ... } -function classifySovereignty(...) { ... } -function readRunState(...) { ... } -function listRunEntries(...) { ... } -function printRunList(...) { ... } -function cleanRuns(...) { ... } -function projectOsTicketPath(...) { ... } -function projectOsArtifactPath(...) { ... } -function planningLaneCount(...) { ... } -function implementationLaneNames(...) { ... } -function lanesUsed(...) { ... } -function writeProjectOsTicket(...) { ... } -function writeCompletionEnvelope(...) { ... } -function phaseCount(...) { ... } -function writeTaskCompletionArtifacts(...) { ... } -function saveState(...) { ... } -function recordPhase(...) { ... } -function updateProviderState(...) { ... } -function buildMatrixFile(...) { ... } -function writeLaneOutput...
